# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

apiVersion: compute.cnrm.cloud.google.com/v1beta1
kind: ComputeInstanceTemplate
metadata:
  name: my-instance-template
spec:
  version: "1"
  instanceTemplates:
  - metadata:
      creationTimestamp: '2023-01-08T15:39:47.643Z'
    spec:
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
      diskEncryption:
        kmsKeyName: default
  - instanceTemplateRef: my-instance-template@1563456892708592
    name: my-instance
    spec:
      serviceAccounts:
      - email: default
        scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
